mutation_diagnostics.trigger_pattern: port_a and port_b have unequal same-direction deviations
mutation_diagnostics.diagnostic_pattern: P_SUM_DIFF_MAPPING mismatch_count>0 with sample_time, expected, observed, metric_gap, and fault_class=wrong_polarity

mutation_diagnostics.trigger_pattern: rst is asserted while the input ports are away from common mode
mutation_diagnostics.diagnostic_pattern: P_RESET_CLEAR mismatch_count>0 with sample_time, expected, observed, metric_gap, and fault_class=missing_reset

mutation_diagnostics.trigger_pattern: trim code changes away from mid-code
mutation_diagnostics.diagnostic_pattern: P_TRIM_RESPONSE mismatch_count>0 with sample_time, expected, observed, metric_gap, and fault_class=missing_calibration

mutation_diagnostics.trigger_pattern: forward and reverse directional components differ
mutation_diagnostics.diagnostic_pattern: P_DIRECTIONAL_METRICS mismatch_count>0 with sample_time, expected, observed, metric_gap, and fault_class=output_swap

mutation_diagnostics.trigger_pattern: the first balanced metric update occurs
mutation_diagnostics.diagnostic_pattern: P_BALANCE_QUALIFICATION mismatch_count>0 with sample_time, expected, observed, metric_gap, and fault_class=qualification_count_error
